pi_items.source: setup_task.sh PL/SQL block creates table raw_hl7_log
export_result.sh verification logic requires table PATIENT_ADMISSIONS
export_result.sh verification logic requires procedure PARSE_HL7_BATCH
export_result.sh explicitly checks for these exact columns in user_tab_columns
setup_task.sh PL/SQL block inserts a sentinel record with PID-3 containing 'TEST999^^^MRN'
setup_task.sh inserts 'Everdeen^Katniss' into PID-5. Given the target format 'Last, First', the verified name is 'Everdeen, Katniss'
setup_task.sh PL/SQL block inserts 'ADT^A01' into MSH-9 for the sentinel record
setup_task.sh PL/SQL block inserts 'J01.90^Acute sinusitis^I10' into DG1-3 for the sentinel record

privileged_info_summary: The task generates 100 synthetic HL7 records using a PL/SQL script in setup_task.sh, loading them into RAW_HL7_LOG. The export_result.sh script independently verifies the target table (PATIENT_ADMISSIONS), the PL/SQL procedure (PARSE_HL7_BATCH), and the required column list. A known sentinel record is injected with MRN 'TEST999', expected formatted name 'Everdeen, Katniss', event 'ADT^A01', and diagnosis code 'J01.90', which all perfectly match the provided metadata claims.
